headline: 3 Profitable Stocks We Steer Clear Of
summary: Not all profitable companies are built to last - some rely on outdated models or unsustainable advantages. Just because a business is in the green today doesn’t mean it will thrive tomorrow.

raw.headline: 3 Profitable Stocks We Steer Clear Of

headline: Constellation Brands faces tricky setup going into Q4 earnings report, says UBS
summary: Constellation Brands Inc (NYSE:STZ) will report its fourth quarter earnings next week, with UBS analysts flagging a “tricky” market setup despite what it sees as improved top line visibility and an attractive valuation. The firm believes that while Constellation Brands, whose portfolio...

headline: Constellation Brands to Report Q4 Earnings: Can It Surprise Investors?
summary: STZ expects Q4 results to reflect declines in the wine and spirits segment and higher costs, but beer capacity expansion and premium brands raise hopes.

headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Constellation Brands, Raises Price Target to $151
summary: Barclays  analyst Lauren Lieberman   maintains Constellation Brands (NYSE:STZ) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $148 to $151.

headline: Needham Reiterates Buy on Constellation Brands, Maintains $180 Price Target
summary: Needham  analyst Gerald Pascarelli   reiterates Constellation Brands (NYSE:STZ) with a Buy and maintains $180 price target.
